description: Curated high-risk ported functions for fast regression testing. Run with: python3 tools/equivalence/regression_test.py

targets.name: FUN_00130580
targets.reason: network_game_server_handle_client_message dispatcher on live MP-host state (server @0x5a90e0). Reachable-path tripwire for @<reg>-marshaling/control-flow/return-value drift (obs 14.3% cov, 50/50 PASS). --no-stub-arg-trace: the only diverging stub args are display_assert/halt_and_catch_fire string-literal pointers (harness artifact). NOT a state-mutation test (state callees stubbed; 0 witnessed server writes). SKIPs when host snapshot absent.

targets.name: FUN_00130270
targets.reason: network_game_server_handle_datagram (broadcast/ping/game-update) on live MP-host state. Reachable-path drift tripwire (obs 10.0% cov, 40/40 PASS). See dispatcher entry for --no-stub-arg-trace rationale. SKIPs when host snapshot absent.

targets.name: actor_compute_prop_target_weight

Audited faithful (a10) — this guards against future lift drift. SKIPs cleanly when the host recording/snapshot is absent (forks, hosted CI) — no game memory in git.
